response.justification: The candidate is a seasoned senior engineer with strong full-stack and systems experience, but the role specifically targets a C++ developer for industrial automation. Their only hands-on C/C++ work is a ~6-month stint at National Instruments over a decade ago; the rest of their career is centered on JavaScript/TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang. There is no evidence of MQTT, message brokers, IEC 62443/SDL, industrial protocols, or automation-domain exposure required by the role.
strengths: 14+ years of senior software experience across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded
Low-latency, multi-threaded systems work (Sociomantic, async I/O, fibers, high-throughput services)
Strong testing/TDD culture and mentorship track record (workshops, dojos, courses)
concerns: Minimal C++/STL experience — only ~6 months at NI in 2014-2015; no recent C++ delivery
No demonstrated industrial-automation, IEC 62443, or SDL/secure-coding background
No evidence of MQTT, Modbus, OPC UA, or message-broker-based architecture work

key_factors.factor: Strong senior engineering breadth and systems performance work
